image.description: Container image used to run the controller.

tag.description: Image tag. Defaults to .Chart.AppVersion when empty.

registry.description: Container registry where the image is hosted.

domain.description: Fully qualified domain of the container registry.

maxPokes.description: Maximum number of pokes per HelmRelease before giving up.

backoff.description: Minimum interval between pokes for the same HelmRelease, as a Go duration (e.g. "5m").

watchLabelSelector.description: If set, only watch HelmReleases matching this label selector (Kubernetes label selector syntax).

resources.description: Pod resource requests and limits for the controller container.

podSecurityContext.description: Security context applied at the pod level.

securityContext.description: Security context applied at the container level.

port.description: TCP port the controller serves Prometheus metrics on.
